---
title: "Exploration of Qualitative Responses and Missing Data"
format: html
editor: visual
code-tools: TRUE
code-fold: TRUE
embed-resources: TRUE
params: 
  src_d: "../Code/R"
  data_d: "../Data"
  doc_freq_threshold: 4
---

# setup

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: FALSE

library("conflicted", quietly = TRUE)
library("magrittr", include.only = c("%<>%","%>%"),
        quietly = TRUE)
library("tidyverse", include.only = c() , quietly = TRUE)
library("gt",include.only=c(), quietly = TRUE)
library("broom",include.only=c(), quietly = TRUE)
library("patchwork",include.only=c(), quietly = TRUE)
library("labelled",include.only=c(), quietly = TRUE)
library("ggthemes",include.only=c(), quietly = TRUE)
library("ggpp",include.only=c(), quietly = TRUE)


ggplot2::theme_set( ggthemes::theme_fivethirtyeight())

response_complete.df <- readRDS(file.path(params[["data_d"]], 
                                                     "responses_final_complete_clean.rds"))
```

```{r}
#| label: fig data setup

response_complete.df %<>% 
  dplyr::rowwise() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(n_fields = length(field_multi)) %>%
  dplyr::ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::mutate(field= ifelse(n_fields==1, field_first, "multiple"))

scales.v <- c("Positivism", "Inclusivity", "Neutrality")
open_types.v <- c("OA","datashare","replication","prereg")
open_measure.v<- c("behavior","opinion","b_percent_1","b_others_1", "b_when_1")

oavars.v<- tidyr::crossing(open_types.v, open_measure.v) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(varname =glue::glue("{x}_{y}",x= open_types.v, y = open_measure.v) ) %>%
  pull(varname)


fig_subset.df <-  
  response_complete.df %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(datashare_b_when_1=NA, prereg_b_when_1=NA) %>%   # MISSING IN SURVEY -- refactor into clean
    dplyr::select(`ResponseId`, {{ scales.v }}, {{ oavars.v }}, `field_first`, `field`, `qualquant`, `gender` )

fig_subset_long.df <- 
  fig_subset.df %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer( cols = !c(`ResponseId`,`field`,`field_first`, `qualquant`, `gender`, {{scales.v}})
                                 , names_to = c("type",".value"),
                       names_pattern ='(.+?)_(.*)')

colnames(fig_subset_long.df)
```

```{r}
#| label: ferg fig 1 analogue


{fig_subset_long.df %>%
  ggplot2::ggplot() + 
  ggplot2::geom_bar( position = position_fill(), width=.2 , aes(y=type, fill=behavior)) + 
  ggplot2::geom_bar( inherit.aes=FALSE, aes(y=type, fill=opinion),
                     position = ggpp::position_fillnudge(y=.3), width=.2)+
    theme(legend.position = "none")
  } /

{fig_subset_long.df %>%
  ggplot2::ggplot() + 
  ggplot2::geom_bar( position = position_fill(), width=.2 , aes(y=type, fill=behavior)) + 
  ggplot2::geom_bar( inherit.aes=FALSE, aes(y=type, fill=opinion),
                     position = ggpp::position_fillnudge(y=.3), width=.2) + 
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(vars(field))+
  ggplot2::labs(fill="") +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "right", legend.direction="vertical")
  } +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(title="Actual OS behavior & attitude")

```

```{r}
#| label: ferg fig 5 analogue


{fig_subset_long.df %>%
  dplyr::summarise(actual = (sum(`behavior`=="Yes", na.rm=TRUE))/
                                          sum(!is.na(`behavior`)),
                   perceived = mean(`b_others_1`, na.rm=TRUE)/100,
                   .groups = "drop")  %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols=c("actual","perceived")) %>%
  dplyr::rename(kind=name, percent=value) %>%
  ggplot2::ggplot() + 
  ggplot2::geom_col( position = position_stack(), width=.2 , aes( x=kind, y=percent, fill=kind)) + 
  ggplot2::coord_flip()+
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "none")
  } /

{fig_subset_long.df %>%
  dplyr::group_by(`field`, `type`) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(actual = (sum(`behavior`=="Yes", na.rm=TRUE))/
                                          sum(!is.na(`behavior`)),
                   perceived = mean(`b_others_1`, na.rm=TRUE)/100,
                   .groups = "drop")  %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(cols=c("actual","perceived")) %>%
  dplyr::rename(kind=name, percent=value) %>%
  ggplot2::ggplot() + 
  ggplot2::geom_col( position = position_stack(), width=.2 , aes( x=kind, y=percent, fill=kind)) + 
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(vars(field))+
  ggplot2::coord_flip()+
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "none") } +
  patchwork::plot_annotation(title="Actual and perceived OS behavior")
```

```{r}
#| label: ferg fig 7  analogue

{fig_subset_long.df %>%
  dplyr::filter(type %in% c("OA", "replication") ) %>%
  ggplot2::ggplot( aes(x = b_when_1 , color = type)) +
  ggplot2::stat_ecdf(geom = "line") +
  ggplot2::labs(y = "Cumulative percentage", x = "Year") +
  ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "none") } /
{fig_subset_long.df %>%
  dplyr::filter(type %in% c("OA", "replication") ) %>%
  ggplot2::ggplot( aes(x = b_when_1 , color = type)) +
  ggplot2::stat_ecdf(geom = "line") +
  ggplot2::labs(y = "Cumulative percentage", x = "Year") + facet_wrap(vars(field))}  /
  {fig_subset_long.df %>%
  dplyr::filter(type %in% c("OA", "replication") ) %>%
  ggplot2::ggplot( aes(x = b_when_1 , color = type)) +
  ggplot2::stat_ecdf(geom = "line") +
  ggplot2::labs(y = "Cumulative percentage", x = "Year") + facet_wrap(vars(as.factor(qualquant)))} 
  patchwork::plot_annotation(title="First year of OA behavior")
```
